theft.punishment: Fines or imprisonment depending on value of property
theft.explanation: Taking someone else's property without consent with intent to permanently deprive.

fraud.punishment: Up to 20 years imprisonment and fines
fraud.explanation: Fraud involving electronic communications or internet.

domestic_violence.explanation: Protects individuals from abuse by intimate partners.

cyber_crime.explanation: Unauthorized access to computer systems or data.
next_steps: Report to FBI Internet Crime Complaint Center (IC3)

accident.punishment: Civil liability or criminal charges depending on severity
accident.explanation: Governs compensation and liability for road accidents.
